payload.answer: Extracted three durable Brain architecture decisions and two open questions without treating unresolved items as current facts.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?
payload.decision: Commit durable architecture decisions for Brain; record unresolved items as open questions, not current facts.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity identifiers were provided; extracted entities are named from the input only.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain memory system.
Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB, not the source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added to Brain later.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while still saturating Brain performance requirements.

details: Committed Brain DB as source of truth.
Committed Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed Slack as strict memory intake agent.
Recorded Telegram addition and model choice as open questions only.
